name: SynerTrade Procurement & Spend Analytics API
what_it_does: SynerTrade REST API for digital procurement and spend analytics platform (Accelerate suite). Enables AI agents to manage sourcing event creation and supplier invitation workflow for e-sourcing automation, handle RFQ, RFP, and auction management data for competitive sourcing analytics, access supplier qualification and performance management data for supply chain risk monitoring, retrieve contract management and obligation tracking data for procurement compliance, handle purchase requisition to purchase order workflow automation, access spend analytics and category management data for procurement strategy, retrieve supplier diversity and ESG data for sustainable procurement reporting, manage e-catalog and hosted catalog data for guided buying, handle savings tracking and procurement KPI data for cost reduction analytics, and integrate procurement data with ERP, accounts payable, and supply chain platforms.
use_cases: Automating sourcing events from strategic procurement agents
Analyzing spend data from category management agents
Monitoring supplier performance from supply chain risk agents
Managing contracts from procurement compliance agents
not_for: Operational purchasing without strategic sourcing and spend analytics
Simple PO systems without supplier management complexity
SMB procurement without enterprise source-to-pay requirements
best_when: A large enterprise using SynerTrade Accelerate wants AI agents to automate sourcing events, spend analytics, supplier performance monitoring, contract compliance tracking, and savings reporting across complex category portfolios.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Procurement decisions trigger supplier contracts and financial commitments — automated sourcing event award without procurement manager authorization creates unauthorized contract commitments. Spend analytics reclassification without accounting team review creates budget tracking errors. Supplier qualification automation must not bypass regulatory required checks (e.g., OFAC, export compliance) before supplier onboarding.

auth.notes: SynerTrade uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-tenant credentials. Webhooks for sourcing and workflow events. REST API with JSON. Munich, Germany HQ. Part of Econocom Group (Belgian IT services company, acquired SynerTrade 2015). SynerTrade Accelerate is the unified procurement platform. Strong in European enterprise procurement. Competes with Coupa, Jaggaer, and Ivalua for global direct/indirect procurement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by module and spend volume under management
pricing.notes: Munich, Germany. SynerTrade founded 2000. Acquired by Econocom (2015). Econocom Group (Belgian ECONOCOM ENXTBR). SynerTrade Accelerate: sourcing, procurement, supplier management, analytics. 250+ enterprise customers. Primarily European market though growing US presence. Competes with Coupa (US-dominant), Jaggaer (US), and Ivalua (European) for e-procurement market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per client

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Sourcing event award automation creates legally binding supplier contracts; automated award without procurement manager approval authorization violates procurement governance
European market orientation — SynerTrade is primarily European; US procurement workflows, tax codes, and compliance requirements may not have full feature coverage
Econocom parent company — SynerTrade is part of Econocom Group; product roadmap and investment level subject to parent company priorities; verify product trajectory
Direct vs. indirect spend modules — SynerTrade covers both direct and indirect procurement but with different workflow configurations; ensure module coverage for your spend category
Multi-language procurement — SynerTrade supports multi-language sourcing events; automated RFQ generation must handle supplier language preferences correctly

Auction and e-sourcing rules — reverse auction automation has legal and ethical requirements in some jurisdictions (e.g., EU procurement directives for public sector); validate auction type compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Procurement and spend analytics. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Supplier, contract, and spend data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Procurement platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. EU. Supplier and spend data.
